title: First Solar Announces Final Sale Amount of 2024 Section 45X Advanced Manufacturing Production Tax Credits
content: First Solar announced the finalization of a $857 million sale of Section 45X Advanced Manufacturing Production tax credits tied to its 2024 U.S. solar module production. The deal, split into fixed and variable transactions (the latter expected to complete by February 28, 2025), will net approximately $819 million in cash. While this results in a roughly $0.42 per share earnings reduction for 2024, the transaction supports U.S. manufacturing and job creation, with the company on track to reach 14 GW of annual domestic capacity by 2026.
author: Analysts Account
